name: tdh-min-boundary
description: Inclusive tdh_min boundary with default TDH strategy (spec §3).
subject: subject

name: tdh-max-boundary
description: Inclusive tdh_max boundary with default TDH strategy (spec §3).
subject: subject

name: tdh-window-both-bounds
description: Both bounds set form an inclusive window (spec §1.2, §3).
subject: subject

name: tdh-zero-profile-zero-min
description: TDH bounds have no non-zero-required semantics: tdh 0 passes tdh_min 0 (spec §1.2, §3).
subject: subject

name: xtdh-strategy-floor-min
description: XTDH strategy floors the fractional xtdh; tdh_min agrees between engines because no integer sits in (floor(x), x] (spec §3).
subject: subject

name: xtdh-fractional-max-divergence
description: XTDH strategy with fractional xtdh at tdh_max: spec compares floor(100.5)=100 <= 100 (eligible); SQL compares the raw double 100.5 > 100 (not a member).
subject: subject

sql.note: SQL compares raw double xtdh 100.5 > tdh_max 100; spec floors to 100 (eligibility-spec.md §3, §12 D-2)

name: both-strategy-sum-and-fractional-max-divergence
description: BOTH strategy sums tdh + xtdh and floors; the fractional sum diverges on tdh_max exactly like XTDH; TDH strategy ignores xtdh entirely.
subject: subject

sql.note: SQL compares raw sum 100.5 > tdh_max 100; spec floors to 100 (eligibility-spec.md §3, §12 D-2)
